input.user_input: Add an exhibit reference to Section 3.2 pointing to 'Exhibit A – Statement of Work'. The exhibit itself is already attached.

actual: It looks like the document wasn't successfully attached to your message. Could you please upload the document? Once you do, I will gladly add the reference to "Exhibit A – Statement of Work" in Section 3.2 for you.
